summary: Iteration 79 testing completed. Price Premium feature verified across all three tabs (Deliveries/Stock Out, Settlements, Billing). Backend tests pass 11/11. Frontend displays Price Premium column correctly with amber color when > 0 and slate-400 when = 0.
critical_code_review_comments: DeliveriesTab.jsx: Price Premium column header at line 657, calculation at line 684-705, Excel export at line 107
SettlementsTab.jsx: Price Premium column header at line 521, account summary at lines 493-495, Excel export at line 183
BillingTab.jsx: Price Premium grand total card at lines 396-406, per-account detail at lines 441-443, table column at line 464
Backend calculate_delivery_item_amounts() correctly calculates price_premium_payable = qty × (customer_selling_price - transfer_price) when customer_price > transfer_price
Frontend uses || 0 fallback for missing price_premium_payable field - handles pre-feature data gracefully
Color coding: amber-600 when price_premium > 0, slate-400 when = 0 - correctly implemented

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Price Premium column visible in all three tabs

context_for_next_testing_agent: Price Premium feature is fully implemented and tested. The feature shows the additional amount manufacturer receives when customer_selling_price > transfer_price. Formula: price_premium = qty × (customer_selling_price - transfer_price). Displayed in amber color when > 0, slate-400 when = 0. Existing pre-feature data shows ₹0.00 which is expected behavior.

DeliveriesTab_Price_Premium_Column.verified: Column header 'PRICE PREMIUM' visible in Stock Out tab table

SettlementsTab_Price_Premium_Column.verified: Column header 'PRICE PREMIUM' visible in expanded settlement table
SettlementsTab_Price_Premium_Column.account_summary: Price Premium shown in account summary card

BillingTab_Price_Premium_Card.verified: Price Premium grand total card present in summary cards section
BillingTab_Price_Premium_Card.subtitle: Payable to Company

BillingTab_Price_Premium_Table.verified: Price Premium column in settlement detail table

Backend_calculate_delivery_item_amounts.formula: price_premium_payable = qty × (customer_selling_price - transfer_price) when customer_price > transfer_price, else 0

Settlements tab showing Price Premium column header and ₹0.00 value
